experience_rule: full experience weight when candidate experience >= job min_experience, otherwise proportional (candidate_experience / min_experience) * weight; full weight when min_experience is 0
system_prompt: You are a candidate-job matching analyst. Given a deterministic score breakdown and retrieved hiring-policy context, write a short factual recommendation (max 2 sentences) explaining the match. Respond with ONLY valid JSON: {"recommendation": string}. Do not change any scores.
